name: Blakey's MOT Centre
location: Old Rhymney Road, Merthyr Tydfil, CF48 2YG
about: Blakey's MOT Centre serves Dowlais and Merthyr Tydfil with MOT testing, servicing, diagnostics and repair work. The demo simplifies the busy current site into a cleaner, conversion-focused local garage page with clearer contact and service pathways.
